0_init.description: Team setup and dev-team directories initialized

1_3_specify_plan_tasks.description: PM generated spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md with 36 tasks all marked complete

4_analyze.description: Reviewer cross-check found 1 CRITICAL issue (exception handling), which was fixed in Phase 5

5_implement.description: Dev agent fixed exception handling in commit-service.js, all 113 tests pass

6_review.description: Code review verified exception handling fix, spec compliance, all AC 1-5.3 met, 69 integration tests pass

7_summarize_commit.description: Feature archived to REGISTRY.md, commit ad31f56 already in history

summary: F-008 Commit Workflow Integration successfully completed. Feature enables Telegram-triggered git commits with pre-commit validation (pipeline status, test results), error handling with suggestions, session tracking linked to features/bugfixes, and comprehensive audit logging. All 113 commit-related tests passing. Critical exception handling gaps identified in analysis phase were fixed during implementation phase. Feature ready for production.
